events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: the missing fire watch during and after hot work is a **fail**, critical risk — a direct violation of NFPA 51B and OSHA 1926.352, since fire watch is the primary safeguard against delayed ignition. Corrective actions include stopping work, posting a trained fire watch, and holding close-out until the required post-work monitoring period is completed and documented.
